execution_steps.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && home="$tmpdir/home" && proj="$tmpdir/proj" && mkdir -p "$home" "$proj" && pack_json=$(npm pack --json) && tarball=$(node -e "const data = JSON.parse(process.argv[1]); process.stdout.write(data[0].filename);" "$pack_json") && tar -tf "$tarball" > "$tmpdir/tar.txt" && if grep -E 'package/src/scripts/|package/src/scripts/(init_ralph_desk|run_ralph_desk|lib_ralph_desk)\.zsh' "$tmpdir/tar.txt" >/dev/null; then echo 'tarball contains legacy zsh runtime' >&2; exit 1; fi && HOME="$home" npm install --prefix "$proj" "$PWD/$tarball" >/dev/null 2>&1 && test -f "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs" && test ! -e "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/run_ralph_desk.zsh" && node "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs" --help | grep -- '--autonomous'
execution_steps.summary: Fresh pack/install smoke passed: tarball excluded legacy zsh runtime files, isolated install created ~/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs, and the installed CLI help worked.
